name: Kiffels
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and butter until pea-sized.
2. Add remaining ingredients to the mixture.
3. Dough may appear soft, but it must be chilled overnight before rolling out.
4. Divide dough into six balls or individual small balls.
5. Roll out each ball in granulated sugar (and some flour).
6. Place walnut filling (or apricot, or prune filling) on the rolled-out dough.
7. Roll up the filled dough and place it back into the refrigerator.
8. Bake at 325°F (Oven) until golden brown.
